author: Sangharakshita
title: Contents of Pre - ordination Course for Men Prior to Tuscany - Padmaloka 1982
content:
SANGHARAKSHITA IN SEMINAR
Questions and Answers At Padmaloka Prior to the 1982 Ordination Course
Contents



2 Traditional recitation of suttas and confession in the Sangha on Full and New Moon days
4 A united Order and a unified Order? The single s ex principle
Do men and women have different natural aptitudes?
5 Masturbation and sexual relationships
6 Fantasising during masturbation
7 Sexual experience and the Brahma Viharas
8 'Oh son of noble family' in the 'Tibetan Book of the Dead'
9 Sounds being associated with particular colours?
10 Why do Stream Entrants not produce other Stream Entrants exponentially?
12 Order members spending at least two hours each day with a mitra
15 The first dhyana. A dilute dhyana state. Degrees of the Buddha's samatha experiences and the stability of his vipassana
experiences
17 The history of the taboo of homosexuality
19 Boxing/violent sport and the first precept
20 Unilateral or multilateral nuclear disarmament?
21 Adultery and the third precept
22 The Mett
ā Bhāvana - choosing appropriate subjects
24 Vipassana in Hinduism?
25 Stigmata
26 Other terms apart from 'growth and development'
27 Are there any distractions in meditation that a re not one of The Five Hindrances?
29 Ways of approaching the god realms
30 The gods of the round and the gods of the path
31 Differentiating between devas and gods, lotuses and transcendental lotuses
33 The Buddha and Ananda
34 Christian Gnosticism
36 Does an amoeba have karma? Do animals have karm a?
What is an instinct?
37 Can a spiritually developed person enjoy eating food?
38 Taking risks and going to extremes if one has t o in one's spiritual life
40 An 'intelligible concept'
42 Mozart and Haydn
43 Why did Dhardo Rimpoche choose to work with chi ldren?
The urge to communicate the Dharma
